creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

thanks for your request.   Before we can add your company to our list we
would need some more information from you as you did not provide any
contact details (like website URLS, email, phone number and so on).

Could you please check the other entries on
http://www.FreeBSD.org/commercial/isp.html and update your request
accordingly?

Regards.


jkois


-- 
Johann Kois
jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Documentation Project
FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
